# Lucide Icons (vendored fragments)

Icon fragments extracted from [Lucide](https://lucide.dev/) v1.8.0.

Each `.svg` file contains only the inner elements (`<path>`, `<circle>`, etc.)
without the outer `<svg>` wrapper. The consuming code wraps them in an `<svg>`
tag with the appropriate `width`, `height`, `viewBox`, `class`, and stroke
attributes for each usage context.

Files named `{icon}.svg` use the standard 24×24 viewBox coordinates.
Files named `{icon}-16x16.svg` (etc.) are hand-drawn variants for smaller
viewBoxes used in dense UI contexts.
